title: Amtech S3000 150mm (6") Stall Clip
features: DURABLE: This 150mm (6") general purpose stall clip is made from tough spring steel and has heavy duty spring for a secure grip
VERSATILE: It is ideal for securing tarpaulins and sheeting
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 6" Stall Clip See more
